description: Expose a rules-as-code intermediate representation that links legal source provisions to OpenFisca/PolicyEngine entities, variables, formulas, parameters, periods, and provenance.
oracle_notes: Repo-side source anchoring, norm semantics, temporal validity, policy taxonomy, provenance, RuleSpec source verification, schema.org/Legislation JSON-LD, rac-export CLI, and offline OpenFisca/PolicyEngine package skeleton generation are implemented. Live executable parity and oracle validation remain external gates.
